note: Canonical app-facing stimulus manifest (contract v2 shape). Served by the backend /stimulus endpoints. SMS stimuli live separately in signals/stimuli/bank.py (owned by Dhruva).

stimuli.prompt: Take a slow look at this image. How does it make you feel right now?
Rest your eyes on this for a moment. What comes up for you?
Listen for a few seconds. Notice what shifts in you, then describe it.
What's one thing on your mind right now?
How would you describe your energy today, in a sentence?
Your deadline just moved up by a week. React honestly — what's your first thought?
A still lake at dawn. What does your body notice as you look?
Soft morning light over the hills. Where does your attention settle?
Quiet light filtering through the trees. What's the first word that comes to mind?
A crowded, rushing crossing. What jumps out at you first?
Bright city lights at night. Notice what your eyes lock onto.
A storm building over the horizon. What does this scene pull from you?
